hero.text: Believe in yourself and all that you are.
hero.author: Christian D. Larson

aries.general: Today, your energy will be off the charts. Channel it wisely and create something amazing.
aries.love: A spark in the relationship could lead to new adventures together.
aries.career: Opportunities for leadership may arise; be ready to step up.

taurus.general: Patience will pay off today. Financial matters may require careful consideration.
taurus.love: An honest conversation will strengthen your bond.
taurus.career: Focus on teamwork to achieve results; collaboration is key.

gemini.general: Your curiosity will lead to interesting discoveries. Stay open-minded.
gemini.love: Flirty connections will brighten your day; enjoy the lightheartedness.
gemini.career: Networking can lead to fruitful collaborations; reach out.

cancer.general: Emotions may run high; embrace them and use them as a strength.
cancer.love: Take time for nurturing your relationship; small gestures matter.
cancer.career: Trust your intuition when making career decisions; it will guide you well.

leo.general: Your charisma will be magnetic today. Use it to inspire others.
leo.love: Expect passion and excitement in your romantic endeavors.
leo.career: Showcase your talents and don't shy away from the spotlight.

virgo.general: Focus on decluttering both your space and mind; clarity is on the horizon.
virgo.love: Seek depth in conversations with loved ones; it will enhance intimacy.
virgo.career: Detail-oriented tasks will bring satisfaction today.

libra.general: Balance is crucial today; find harmony between work and personal life.
libra.love: A small act of kindness can deepen connections with significant others.
libra.career: Collaborative efforts will lead to success; seek alliances.

scorpio.general: Passion fuels your day. Use it to tackle challenges head-on.
scorpio.love: Intense feelings may surface; embrace the vulnerability.
scorpio.career: Strategic thinking will unlock solutions to persisting problems.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls! Be ready to embrace new experiences with an open heart.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity in love will bring joy; don't hold back on surprises.
sagittarius.career: Creative projects will flourish with your imaginative spirit.

capricorn.general: Hard work pays off; stay committed to your goals for long-term success.
capricorn.love: Dedicate time to your partner and express your feelings openly.
capricorn.career: Your determination will inspire others; be a role model.

aquarius.general: Innovation is key today; think outside the box to solve problems.
aquarius.love: Find ways to connect deeply with loved ones; share your dreams.
aquarius.career: Your progressive ideas will attract attention; share them.

pisces.general: Trust your instincts today; they’ll lead you to opportunities.
pisces.love: Romance is in the air, use your creativity to express feelings.
pisces.career: Creative collaborations will yield fulfilling results.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
professional.author: Norman Vaughan

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Success is not how high you have climbed, but how you make a positive difference to the world.
motivation.author: Roy T. Bennett

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Unknown

motivation.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
motivation.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embracing the journey, one step at a time.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change - technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food, and I eat it.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right.
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: If you think you're too small to make a difference, try sleeping with a mosquito.
fun.author: Dalai Lama

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is the bridge between where I am and where I want to be.
faith.author: Unknown

wisdom.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
wisdom.author: Nelson Mandela

wisdom.text: Life is what happens when you're busy making other plans.
wisdom.author: John Lennon

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: It is not the length of life, but depth of life.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha
